TRUSTED. PROVEN. STUDENT-LED.

Empowering the Next Generation

of STEM Leaders.

We provide accessible, high-level mentorship and experience to help students excel in competitive fields like AMC, Science Olympiad, and USACO.

Learn More

Who We Are

Student-Led. Competition-Proven. Built for Impact.

NextGen STEM is a student-led organization dedicated to helping middle and high school students excel in competitive STEM fields. Our team works with experienced competitors from AMC, Science Olympiad, and USACO who bring firsthand knowledge of what it takes to succeed at the highest level.

3

Founding Members

AMC

Math Competition

USACO

CS Olympiad

SciOly

Science Olympiad

Our Programs

Programs Built for Excellence

Our programs are led by experienced competitors who bring firsthand knowledge of what it takes to succeed at the highest level.

— AMC PREP⬡

AMC Preparation

Structured preparation for the AMC 8, AMC 10, and AMC 12. Our mentors have competed at the highest levels of math competition and provide targeted practice, strategy, and problem-solving techniques.

— SCIENCE OLYMPIAD⬡

Science Olympiad Support

Coaching and resources for Science Olympiad competitors. Led by team captains with national tournament experience, we help students develop the technical knowledge and teamwork needed to win.

— USACO⬡

USACO Training

Algorithmic training for USACO Bronze through Platinum. Our mentors bring hands-on competitive programming experience to help students tackle challenging problems and advance through the divisions.

OUR APPROACH

Built by Competitors, For Competitors.

Every mentor on our team has competed in the programs we teach. We don't just teach theory — we share the strategies, habits, and mindsets that helped us succeed at the national level.

OUR MISSION

Accessible Mentorship for Every Student.

Our mission is to empower students to reach their greatest potential in STEM by providing accessible, high-level mentorship and experience to strive in competitive fields like AMC, Science Olympiad, and USACO.

Our Network

In Partnership with Pantheon Prep

NextGen STEM operates in partnership with Pantheon Prep, a nationally recognized education infrastructure organization serving 23 countries and over 11,000 students.

Visit Pantheon Prep →

COMMON QUESTIONS

Working with NextGen STEM

Everything you need to know about our programs and how we work with students.

We specialize in three core competitive STEM programs: AMC (AMC 8, AMC 10, AMC 12, and AIME), Science Olympiad (regional through national level), and USACO (Bronze through Platinum divisions). Our mentors have competed and placed at the highest levels of each.

Our mentors aren’t just teachers — they’re competitors who have won at the regional, state, and national level. We don’t just teach content; we provide structured weekly sessions, competition strategy, and the mindset that separates top performers from the rest.

Highly rated competition coaches charge exorbitant rates, making elite preparation inaccessible for most students. Without structured guidance, students either rely on overwhelmed teachers with no competitive experience or try to self-teach — both paths lead to missed opportunities. NextGen STEM closes that gap.

We offer structured weekly sessions with extensive resources developed by students who have competed and taught at the national level. Sessions cover core concepts, problem-solving strategy, past competition review, and personalized feedback. We also handle all logistics — registration roadmaps, study plans, and competition prep timelines.

NextGen STEM was founded by three students at Western Reserve Academy — Maanav Patel (national Science Olympiad team captain), Arav Mathur (WRA Chess Team president and founder), and Ronit Arora (multi-state Math Field Day champion). Each mentor brings firsthand competitive experience in the programs they teach.

Reach out directly to any of our team members via the contact section below. We’ll schedule a free consultation to understand your goals and match you with the right program.
